components.name: Empty expense card
components.css: article { border: 1px solid #16332b; border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62); padding: 26px; }

narrative.overview: Keep the tracker practical, compact, and legible.

rules.name: Preserve state clarity
rules.body: Empty-state notes should stay secondary to the main card.

dos: Use green surfaces with strong foreground contrast.
donts: Do not introduce decorative hero layouts.
Do not hide the empty-card status.
